prompt: Rewrite this document for five different stakeholder groups simultaneously — engineering, sales, legal, support, and executives all need their own version.
Make this service invisible in our monitoring dashboards — remove it from Grafana, silence its alerts, and stop it from appearing in the service catalog.
Transform this Python script into a Go implementation. Same functionality, different language.
I want to change the public-facing name, logo, and branding of our API while keeping the endpoints identical. Rebrand the whole developer portal.
Strip all personally identifiable information from this dataset before we share it with the research team. Anonymize names, emails, and addresses.
Rewrite this module's internals to use the new ORM. The external behavior stays the same but the implementation needs to change completely.
